summary: Frontend smoke + flow test PASSED on Zentia VolleyPro. Login/logout, all 11 sidebar nav items, roster add player, communications post, announcements create, gallery add image, datavolley button mode (12 dv-* buttons all rendered & functional), live stats summary populates, advanced mode codes (01a#hp+) appear in log, save score works, lineup page renders with 6 P1-P6 court slots and bench, analytics page renders bar chart + radar chart with real data. No webpack overlay; icon import fixes from prior iteration are confirmed working.

issues: Radar polygon is barely visible at small data scale; labels overlap (Aces / Bloqueos / fensas) on small datasets. Cosmetic only.
Two console 401 errors logged on first load from /api/auth/me probe (expected pre-login but noisy in console). Suppress or downgrade log level.

action_items: (Optional) Suppress the /api/auth/me 401 console noise on the public /login page (axios interceptor or guard before calling /me when no cookie).
(Optional / cosmetic) Fix radar chart label 'fensas' (truncated 'Defensas') and improve radar visibility for low-volume matches.

Carry over from iteration 1: tighten authorization on /api/teams/{id}, players, matches, stats, lineups so users only access their team_id; CORS allow_origins explicit when credentials=True; default register role should not silently grant head_coach.
critical_code_review_comments: Auth probe on every page load can fire 401 even when there is no session cookie; consider checking document.cookie or a flag before calling /me on public routes to reduce noise.
server.py still 600+ lines; would benefit from being split into auth/teams/matches/stats/comms routers.
DELETE endpoints don't 404 on missing resources (idempotent but breaks REST expectations).
seed_data_creation: Added during testing: TEST_P_QA player (#77), 'TEST_QA hola equipo' chat message, 'TEST_QA Anuncio' announcement, gallery image (picsum.photos). Stats added to existing match for #99 TEST_Hitter. Not auto-cleaned.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend is fully functional. Login admin@zentia.com / ZentiaAdmin2026! redirects to /dashboard. Sidebar testids: nav-dashboard, nav-roster, nav-lineup, nav-schedule, nav-matches, nav-results, nav-attendance, nav-communications, nav-announcements, nav-gallery, nav-analytics. Match detail at /matches/{id} with 12 dv-* buttons. Logout via [data-testid=logout-btn]. Note: dv player chip testids appear different from documented 'dv-player-{num}' prefix (chips render but selector [data-testid^=dv-player-] returned empty); however clicking dv-* stat buttons still logged stats correctly so default/auto-select works. Verify chip selector if needed.
rca of the issue: No outstanding bug. Iteration 1 webpack icon-import errors were fixed by main agent and login page now renders cleanly; full UI flow works.
